name: bono-leads-connector-integration
description: Integration test harness for the Bono Leads Connector plugin

scripts.provision: node tests-integration/provision/wait-for-wp.mjs && wp-env run cli wp eval-file wp-content/plugins/bono-leads-connector/tests-integration/provision/seed-forms.php && wp-env run cli wp eval-file wp-content/plugins/bono-leads-connector/tests-integration/provision/configure-plugin.php
